# resend_automation (Resource)

Manages a Resend automation. steps and connections are JSON strings (use jsonencode()).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "resend_automation" "example" {
  name   = "Onboarding Flow"
  status = "disabled"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Automation name.

### Optional

- `connections` (String) JSON array of step connections. Must be provided with steps.
- `status` (String) enabled or disabled.
- `steps` (String) JSON array of automation steps. Must be provided with connections.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Automation UUID.
